summary: Iteration 96: Testing Performance Analytics System. All 13 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified Analytics button (data-testid='analytics-btn') and Analytics panel (data-testid='studio-analytics-panel') render correctly with performance data, pipeline versions, and recommendations. Code review confirmed _call_claude_sync has 5 retries with exponential backoff.
critical_code_review_comments: studio.py: _call_claude_sync has 5 retries with exponential backoff: wait = min(5 * (2 ** attempt), 60) - max 60s wait
studio.py: _call_claude_async has 3 retries with linear backoff: await asyncio.sleep(5 * (attempt + 1))
studio.py: Retryable errors include: 502, 503, 529, timeout, disconnected, overloaded, connection, reset, eof, broken pipe, server
studio.py: GET /api/studio/analytics/performance returns summary, timing, pipeline_versions, cost_estimate, productions, recommendations
studio.py: _generate_recommendations() provides AI-like performance recommendations based on error rate, agent times, video times
DirectedStudio.jsx: Analytics button (data-testid='analytics-btn') visible in Step 0 project list
DirectedStudio.jsx: Analytics panel (data-testid='studio-analytics-panel') shows summary cards, timing bars, pipeline versions, cost savings, recommendations, and per-production breakdown
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing completed project b4435a8658b4
context_for_next_testing_agent: Analytics endpoint GET /api/studio/analytics/performance returns detailed performance data. Current data shows: 1 completed production (b4435a8658b4), 2 scenes, 2 videos, v2_batched=1. Analytics button is in DirectedStudio Step 0 (data-testid='analytics-btn'). Panel shows summary cards, timing bars, pipeline version counts, cost estimates, and AI recommendations. Claude retry logic: sync=5 retries with exponential backoff (max 60s), async=3 retries with linear backoff.

backend_api_tests.GET /api/studio/analytics/performance: PASS - Returns valid JSON with summary, timing, pipeline_versions, cost_estimate, productions, recommendations
backend_api_tests.Analytics summary structure: PASS - Contains total_projects, completed, errored, total_scenes_produced, total_videos_generated
backend_api_tests.Analytics timing structure: PASS - Contains avg_agent_seconds, avg_video_seconds, avg_total_seconds, min/max_total_seconds, avg_scenes_per_project
backend_api_tests.Analytics pipeline_versions: PASS - Contains v1_sequential, v2_batched, v3_parallel_teams counts
backend_api_tests.Analytics cost_estimate: PASS - Contains claude_calls_total, claude_tokens_est, sora2_videos, optimization_note
backend_api_tests.Analytics productions list: PASS - List of productions with project_id, name, scenes, videos, pipeline_version
backend_api_tests.Analytics recommendations: PASS - List with type (critical/warning/info/success) and text
backend_api_tests._call_claude_sync retry logic: PASS - 5 retries with exponential backoff (wait = min(5 * 2^attempt, 60))

frontend_ui_tests.Analytics panel: PASS - data-testid='studio-analytics-panel' renders after clicking button
frontend_ui_tests.Analytics panel content: PASS - Shows performance data, pipeline versions (v1/v2/v3), and recommendations

code_review._call_claude_sync 5 retries: VERIFIED - for attempt in range(5) with exponential backoff
